mapper.sql: id, content_type, content_id, job_id, idempotency_key, content_hash, session_id, user_id, status, agent_reply, error_message, trace_id, requested_at, started_at, completed_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM content_agent_comment_job WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM content_agent_comment_job WHERE job_id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE content_agent_comment_job SET job_id = #{jobId}, status = #{status}, error_message = NULL, agent_reply = NULL, trace_id = #{traceId}, started_at = NULL, completed_at = NULL, requested_at = #{requestedAt} WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} AND status = 'failed'
UPDATE content_agent_comment_job SET status = 'running', started_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status IN ('pending', 'failed')
UPDATE content_agent_comment_job SET status = 'done', agent_reply = #{agentReply}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3), error_message = NULL WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'running'
UPDATE content_agent_comment_job SET status = 'failed', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status IN ('pending', 'running')
